prestazioni: Engine: K20A (2.0L NA, 240 PS stock) with Tomei Type-S forged pistons (87mm bore, 12.0:1 CR) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM durability, paired with a Tomei 272°/276° camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and Supertech titanium retainers to handle 9,500 RPM redline safely.

Forced induction: HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2835 ball-bearing turbo, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and HKS Hi-Power 45mm wastegate, tuned via Hondata KPro V4 ECU with custom Mugen RR-specific fuel/timing maps for 350 WHP on 93 octane (400 WHP on E85 with ID1000 injectors and Walbro 450LPH fuel pump).

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way) with 85W-140 GL-5 gear oil, paired with a MFactory 84mm lightweight flywheel and Spec Stage 3+ clutch (6 puck, steel-backed). Transmission reinforced with PPG close-ratio gears (1st: 3.266, 2nd: 2.130, 3rd: 1.517) and Synchrotech carbon synchros for rapid shifts.
estetica: Aero: Mugen RR-specific Spoon Sports carbon fiber front bumper with integrated canards (JDM-spec, no fog lights), paired with a Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, 3D carbon fiber) and custom aluminum diffuser from J's Racing (3-piece, 90mm height).

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P (15x8 +35 front, 15x9 +40 rear) with Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear) and Project Kics R40 6-pot calipers (330mm rotors) for track-focused braking.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FRP shell, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, Mugen RR-specific titanium shift knob (70mm height, 120g weight), and Defi BF gauges (oil temp, oil pressure, boost) mounted on a custom aluminum A-pillar pod (JDM Mugen RR replica).
